Patch.Change: Complete v2.0 rebuild with P2P-OS integration
Story → Surface Router for content compounding

AuditLog.Check: human_first: PASS (humans own final truth on pricing/claims)
evidence_honesty: PASS (no fabricated proof, hypothesis framing)
consent_intent: PASS (no fake urgency, respect autonomy)

Purpose.PrimeDirective: Ship products people already want, with monetization and distribution designed in from day one.
Purpose.CoreOutcome: In 7–21 days, repeatedly ship products that pass demand thresholds before heavy building, and have a distribution plan baked in.

NonNegotiable.Name: Validation Before Build
NonNegotiable.Rule: Prove demand with signals, waitlists, or pre-sales before serious building

NonNegotiable.Name: Outcome Over Features
NonNegotiable.Rule: Sell transformations, not content volume or tool access

NonNegotiable.Name: Distribution Is Part of Product
NonNegotiable.Rule: PITM (Product Is The Marketing) - marketing teaches the method product implements

Purpose.DefaultLoop: Discover → Validate → Outline/Design → MVP Ship → Launch → Measure → Double down/Pivot → Scale

WhenToUse.Trigger: Create a new digital product from scratch
Validate a product idea before building

NotFor.Item: Content-only products with no transformation (use content skills instead)
Pure SaaS technical builds (use app development skills)

Truth.name: Transformation Over Information
Truth.Doctrine: Products must produce behavior + identity change, not just content consumption
Truth.Implication: Measure success by outcomes achieved, not modules completed
Truth.Test: Can you point to specific behavioral change by Day 14?

Truth.name: Whole Solution Integration
Truth.Doctrine: Physical + Digital + Community + AI must work together as unified system
Truth.Implication: No siloed components; every element references and reinforces others
Truth.Test: Does removing any component break the transformation?

Truth.name: Human Core, AI Shell
Truth.Doctrine: Sell human expertise and outcomes; AI amplifies delivery, not replaces value
Truth.Implication: The proprietary method is human; AI makes it accessible and scalable
Truth.Test: Would this still work without AI? (Should be yes, just slower)

Truth.name: Validate First, Build Second
Truth.Doctrine: No serious build without 72-hour validation signal or 2+ source market proof
Truth.Implication: Build only after waitlist threshold passed or pre-sell converts
Truth.Test: Can you cite demand evidence? If no, validation gate not passed.

Truth.name: UVE Over USP
Truth.Doctrine: Ultimate Value Experience (dimensionalized ideal life result) beats Unique Selling Proposition
Truth.Implication: Sell the vision of the transformed life, not just differentiated features
Truth.Test: Can the buyer see themselves living the result?

Truth.name: 10× Value Justification
Truth.Doctrine: Buyers must feel the value is 10× the price paid
Truth.Implication: Scope product to price; higher price = more implementation support
Truth.Test: Would you feel over-served at this price?

Required.Object: ICP definition: demographics, psychographics, pain language, desires
Initial offer concept: audience, outcome, mechanism, timeframe

Optional.Object: Testimonials, case studies, data, credentials for proof
Competitor analysis, marketplace signals, community pain mining
Before/after belief mapping for transformation design
Prior content, products, or systems to leverage

Outputs.Output: Complete product ecosystem: tiers, components, pricing, delivery
Entry → Core → Premium → VIP tier structure
One-sentence positioning: [Product] helps [audience] achieve [outcome] without [friction] by using [mechanism] in [timeframe]
Landing page, traffic plan, thresholds, pivot matrix
Community, coaching, resources, AI support design
PITM content, influencer partnerships, launch sequence
Story sequences, UGC scripts, CTA assets
Downstream skill triggers (Sales Page, Email, Content)

Input.name: AVATAR_BUNDLE
Input.Notes: ICP: who exactly, what blocks them, what done looks like

Input.name: OFFER_SEED
Input.Notes: Initial concept: audience, outcome, mechanism, timeframe

Input.name: EVIDENCE_PACK
Input.Notes: Proof assets: testimonials, case studies, data

Input.name: MARKET_RESEARCH_BUNDLE
Input.Notes: Competitor analysis, marketplace signals, pain mining

OutputsPrimary.Output: Complete product ecosystem with tiers, components, pricing

Layer.name: Quick Reference

TriggerConditions.Condition: Fast decision on format or pricing

Layer.DecisionTree: START → Have validated demand? ├─ NO → Go to Phase 1 (Discover + Validate) │ ├─ Run Triangulated Proof (marketplace + ads + communities) │ ├─ Pass: 2+ sources show demand → Continue │ └─ Fail: <2 sources → Pivot angle or niche │ └─ YES → Have Irresistible Offer Statement? ├─ NO → Generate Offer Statement │ "[Product] helps [audience] achieve [outcome] │ without [friction] by using [mechanism] in [timeframe]" │ └─ YES → Price set? ├─ NO → Use 10× Value Justification │ └─ Scope to price (higher = more support) │ └─ YES → Run 3-Input Outline Engine ├─ Input 1: Offer Statement ├─ Input 2: Format (course/ebook/app/hybrid) └─ Input 3: Price ↓ Generate MVP Outline → Build → Launch

FastOutputs.Output: [Product] helps [specific audience] achieve [desired outcome] without [main frustration] by using [mechanism: steps/templates/tools] in [timeframe].
Perceived value must = 10× price. Higher price → add implementation assets. Lower price → narrow scope, faster win.
Waitlist: ≥15% on 500-1000 visitors Pre-sell: 10-20 sales to 100+ waitlist

Step.name: Market Proof Research

Substeps.Substep: Ads scan (Facebook Ads Library, TikTok ads signals)
Community scan (Reddit, Facebook Groups, X pain language)

Step.Gate: Must have proof from ≥2 sources to proceed

Step.name: UVC Selection
Step.Template: Group: [who exactly] Problem: [what blocks them right now] Outcome: [what "done" looks like] Mechanism: [your system that gets them there]
Step.Gate: One product → one problem → one solution

Step.name: Offer Engineering
Step.Template: [Product] helps [specific audience] achieve [desired outcome] without [main frustration] by using [mechanism: steps/templates/tools] in [timeframe].

Step.name: Profit-First Validation Funnel
Step.Action: Build landing page + run traffic test

Substeps.Substep: Pain mining → exact phrasing from market
Drive 500-1000 visitors ($20/day ads or targeted communities)

Gates.Gate: 10-20 pre-sells to 100+ waitlist → green light build

Step.name: 3-Input Outline Engine
Step.Output: Module outline + fill-in ideas + deliverables list

Rules.Rule: Higher price → add templates, examples, implementation support
Lower price → narrow scope, faster win, fewer modules

Substeps.Substep: Polish: add examples, templates, brand voice

Step.name: PITM Content Loop
Step.Action: Create marketing content that teaches the method
Step.Rule: Every content piece is a slice of the product method
One CTA, one destination (waitlist or purchase)

Substeps.Substep: Recreate with your twist + product CTA
Add missing value assets users request

FailureMode.Name: Build Before Validate
FailureMode.Detection: No demand evidence cited; product already built
FailureMode.Prevention: Proof gate enforced at Phase 1 exit

Recovery.Step: Every module ends with DO action

FailureMode.Name: No Breakthrough Week 1-2
FailureMode.Detection: No measurable quick win in first 14 days

Recovery.Step: Redesign Phase 1 until quick win exists
Quick win must be: measurable, achievable, motivating
Add quick win in first session
Reframe AI as delivery enhancement, not the product
Lead with outcome, mention AI as "how it works"
Human method is core; AI makes it accessible

FailureMode.Name: Unrealistic Timelines / Hype Promises
FailureMode.Detection: Claims not backed by evidence, "get rich quick" vibes

FailureMode.Name: Content-Based Tiering
FailureMode.Detection: Premium tier = more videos (not more support)

FailureMode.Name: Content Gets Views But No Clicks
FailureMode.Detection: High impressions, low CTR to offer

LikelyCauses.Cause: CTA mismatch (content doesn't lead to offer)

Recovery.Step: Tighten CTA alignment with content topic
Ensure landing page matches content promise
Test different CTAs (resource vs call vs waitlist)

FailureMode.Name: Launch Obsession, Delivery Neglect
FailureMode.Detection: All energy on launch, retention/completion ignored

Recovery.Step: Build support system before scaling acquisition

EdgeCase.name: Hybrid Physical + Digital
EdgeCase.Scenario: Product includes physical kit + digital course + community

Handling.Step: Use KB-ONBOARDING-RETENTION for physical unboxing experience
Cross-reference physical components in digital modules
Ensure physical materials arrive BEFORE digital access starts
Escalation path: Core → Group → 1:1 as needed
VIP welcome ritual (personal call, custom plan)
Guarantee tied to completion, not just purchase

EdgeCase.name: First Cohort Beta
EdgeCase.Scenario: Launching to founding members before full build

Handling.Step: Upgrade path to full program when complete

EdgeCase.name: Productized Agency Service
EdgeCase.Scenario: Converting done-for-you service to done-with-you product

Handling.Step: Document your internal SOP → becomes product curriculum
Add templates/tools you use → client deliverables
Maintain VIP tier for full-service clients

Block.name: KB-ONBOARDING-RETENTION
Block.Purpose: 7-day breakthrough sequence, retention triggers, dropout prevention

Block.name: KB-OFFER-TIERING-VALIDATION
Block.Purpose: Tier structure, pricing validation, value justification

Block.name: KB-CONSCIOUSNESS-CONVECTION
Block.Purpose: Neuro-resonance integration, viral heat mechanics, ethical boundaries
Block.Triggers: During messaging, content, and launch phases

Block.name: KB-PATTERN-REGISTRIES
Block.Purpose: Memory layer for compounding (hooks, templates, winners, rules)
Block.Provides: Hook templates, voice DNA, transitions, visual stuns, performance signals
Block.Triggers: Continuous - every content creation and iteration cycle

Coordination.Flow: 1. PCG creates ECOSYSTEM_BLUEPRINT + TRANSFORMATION_MAP 2. KB-OFFER-TIERING generates OFFER_LADDER aligned to transformation 3. KB-ONBOARDING designs 7-day sequence for each tier 4. KB-CONSCIOUSNESS ensures neuro-balance + convection design 5. KB-PATTERN-REGISTRIES stores winning patterns for iteration
Coordination.LockedObjects: All blocks share: TRANSFORMATION_MAP, OFFER_LADDER, AVATAR_BUNDLE

Primary.Skill: PCG defines transformation journey → TEA designs physical manifestation + delivery ops Handoff: ECOSYSTEM_BLUEPRINT + SUPPORT_SYSTEM_SPEC → TEA produces delivery cadence, rituals

Secondary.Skill: Consumes: ECOSYSTEM_BLUEPRINT, OFFER_LADDER Produces: Content strategy, hook bank, distribution plan Trigger: After validation passed, during launch prep
Consumes: IRRESISTIBLE_OFFER_STATEMENT, TRANSFORMATION_MAP, EVIDENCE_PACK Produces: Sales page copy, objection handling, guarantee framing Trigger: After MVP Outline complete
Consumes: ONBOARDING_7_DAY_PLAN, OFFER_LADDER Produces: Welcome sequence, nurture series, launch emails Trigger: After onboarding designed
Consumes: ECOSYSTEM_BLUEPRINT, performance data Produces: Weekly review, strategic adjustments, scaling decisions Trigger: Post-launch, ongoing

StorySurfaceRouter.Description: Automatically compound winning content structures across Business OS surfaces. One winning structure → 5+ outputs (outbound, offer page, nurture, ads, etc.)

Route.Surface: Offer Bullets: Reality beats as ladder

UVEFramework.Name: Ultimate Value Experience
UVEFramework.Description: Dimensionalized vision of an idealized life result. More sophisticated than USP (Unique Selling Proposition). Maps to the 6-axis Neuro-Box (Matrix of Desires).

Application.Step: Identify which UVE dimensions your product activates
Map transformation to dimension shifts (before → after)
Craft messaging that paints the UVE picture
Ensure product delivery actually creates the experience

SelfAnnealingProtocol.Description: PCG continuously improves through KB Memory integration. Winners become templates. Corrections become rules.

Framework.name: Triangulated Proof

Sources.Source: ClickBank, Etsy, Gumroad - what's already selling
Facebook Ads Library, TikTok - what's being aggressively promoted
Reddit, Facebook Groups, X - what pains people describe unprompted

Framework.DecisionRule: If you can't find proof across at least 2 of 3 sources, downscope or pivot the angle.

Framework.name: Irresistible Offer Statement
Framework.Purpose: Force clarity on audience, transformation, and differentiation before building
Framework.Template: [Product] helps [specific audience] achieve [desired outcome] without [main frustration] by using [mechanism: steps/templates/tools] in [timeframe].
Framework.WhenToUse: Before outlining, sales page writing, ads, or content-driven selling

Framework.name: 10× Value Justification
Framework.Purpose: Determine how robust product needs to be given the price

Adjustments.IfHigherPrice: Add: templates, examples, implementation support, DWY assets, coaching
Adjustments.IfLowerPrice: Remove: modules, narrow scope, faster win, single transformation

Framework.Test: Would a buyer feel over-served at this price? If no, add more value or lower price.

Framework.name: 3-Input Outline Engine
Framework.Purpose: Generate complete product structure without manual outlining
Framework.Output: - Module outline aligned to promised outcome - Fill-in suggestions for each section - Deliverables list (templates, scripts, tools) - QC checklist for actionability
Framework.BuildRule: Outline first, then create assets module-by-module

Framework.name: Profit-First Validation Funnel
Framework.Purpose: Prove demand with numbers before heavy building

Steps.Step: Identify specific pain statements in communities
One page: problem → promise → mechanism → CTA
Send 500-1000 visitors ($20/day ads or targeted communities)
If 100+ waitlist, offer early access discount

Framework.PivotOrder: ICP → Promise → Mechanism → Price → Page Clarity

Framework.name: PITM
Framework.Purpose: Build demand while building the product
Framework.Principle: Marketing content should teach the method the product implements

Rules.Rule: Create hooks that share a valuable step or insight
Drive traffic to one CTA (waitlist, purchase, or webinar)
Every content piece is a slice of the product method

ContentLoop.Step: Recreate structure with your twist + product CTA

Framework.name: Offer Ladder

Tiers.Tier: Coaching tier, group program, priority support

Framework.Principle: Tiering by SUPPORT level, not content volume. Same transformation, different levels of help getting there.

Framework.name: Program Model Elements

Elements.Element: Should Have Asked Questions - questions they don't know to ask
Common breaking points and how to avoid
What to combine for multiplicative results

Framework.Application: Include all 5 elements in product design to create comprehensive solution

Framework.name: Whole Solution Stack
Framework.Purpose: Integrate all components for complete transformation
Framework.Rule: Every component must reference and reinforce the others
Framework.Test: Does removing any component break the transformation?

Qualification.Check: Story views plausible vs follower count

Tool.name: validate_offer_statement
Tool.Purpose: Check Irresistible Offer Statement has all components

Tool.name: validate_triangulated_proof
Tool.Purpose: Check if idea has proof from 2+ sources
Tool.Input: proof_sources: dict with marketplace, ads, community keys
Tool.Output: ValidationResult with source count and pass/fail

Tool.name: calculate_10x_value
Tool.Purpose: Calculate perceived value and scope requirements

Tool.name: validate_validation_thresholds
Tool.Purpose: Check if validation thresholds are met
Tool.Input: visitors: int, waitlist_signups: int, presales: int
Tool.Output: Validation status with pass/fail per threshold

Tool.name: validate_offer_ladder
Tool.Purpose: Check offer ladder has proper tier differentiation
Tool.Input: tiers: list of tier dicts with name, price, support_level
Tool.Output: Ladder validation with tier spacing and support progression

Tool.name: check_whole_solution_stack
Tool.Purpose: Verify all 4 components of Whole Solution Stack present
Tool.Input: components: dict with physical, digital, community, ai keys

Tool.name: validate_breakthrough_week1
Tool.Purpose: Check if product has measurable quick win in Week 1-2

RoutingTriggers.Trigger: Load L1, assess if L2 needed based on complexity
Load L2 + PITM + Viral Resonance Architect

LayerLoadConditions.L1: Default for quick decisions and simple products
LayerLoadConditions.L2: Multi-phase creation, tiered offers, distribution planning
LayerLoadConditions.L3: Recovery from failures, edge cases, complex constraints
LayerLoadConditions.L4: Full ecosystem builds, cross-skill coordination, advanced integration

AlwaysWake.Reason: PCG defines what; TEA designs how to deliver

QualityDimensions.Dimension: Demand evidence from 2+ sources before build recommendation
All 6 components present in Irresistible Offer Statement
Scope aligned to price with 10x perceived value
Measurable quick win designed for first 14 days
Tier differentiation by support level, not content volume
PITM content plan, not afterthought marketing
All claims cite evidence or framed as hypothesis

HardGates.Gate: Cannot recommend build without validation evidence
Must produce behavior change, not just content consumption

MMAIntegration.PassThreshold: Score ≥80% on weighted dimensions AND all hard gates passed

GoldenRun.name: Time-Poor Skeptical Avatar
GoldenRun.Scenario: Create a digital product for busy professionals who've been burned before. Skeptical of online courses, limited time (30min/day max).

ExpectedOutputs.Output: Breakthrough by Day 7-14 with tasks under 30 minutes

ValidationChecks.Check: Quick wins achievable in short sessions

GoldenRun.name: High-Ticket VIP Hybrid
GoldenRun.Scenario: Design a $5000+ offer combining 1:1 coaching, group program, and digital assets. Needs escalation path and clear VIP differentiation.

ExpectedOutputs.Output: Strong support system at every tier
VIP welcome ritual and custom planning

GoldenRun.name: First Cohort Beta Program
GoldenRun.Scenario: Launch founding member program before full product is built. Need to balance value with iteration speed.

ExpectedOutputs.Output: Explicit beta framing with feedback expectations

GoldenRun.name: Miracle Sleep Reset Program
GoldenRun.Scenario: Create a body renewal program focused on sleep transformation. Physical + digital + AI hybrid. Could become franchise model.

ExpectedOutputs.Output: UVE mapping across 6 dimensions (especially Body + Mind)
Physical kit + digital protocol + community + AI coach
FAQs, SHAQs, Hacks, Cracks, Stacks included

Templates.Template:
PRE-HEADLINE: [Who it's for] HEADLINE: [Outcome promise] SUB-HEADLINE: [Remove main friction]
MECHANISM BULLETS (3-5): • [How it works step 1] • [How it works step 2] • [How it works step 3]
PROOF: [Process proof, examples, mini case studies - even if early stage]
WHAT'S INCLUDED: • [Deliverable 1] • [Deliverable 2] • [Deliverable 3]
CTA: [Waitlist / Buy Now]
FAQ: • How much time does this take? • Who is this NOT for? • What if it doesn't work for me?

PROBLEM: [Describe the pain they're experiencing]
PROMISE: [What transformation awaits]
WHAT'S INCLUDED: • [Module/deliverable 1] • [Module/deliverable 2] • [Module/deliverable 3] • [Bonus if applicable]
EARLY ACCESS DISCOUNT: Regular: $[full_price] Founding Member: $[discounted_price]
DEADLINE: [Real deadline with real reason]
EXPECTATIONS: [What they need to bring, time commitment, etc.]

[1 line compliment - specific to their content]
[1 line what you do + who you help]
[1 line offer - commission-based, low risk for them]
[1 line CTA - "Want details?"]
Example: "Loved your reel on [topic] - the [specific thing] was spot on.
I help [audience] achieve [outcome] with [mechanism].
Looking for partners: 50% commission on each sale, tracked links, no upfront cost.
Want me to send the details?"

PRE-BUILD (required before creating content): [ ] Offer statement locked (all 6 components) [ ] Pricing locked (10x value justified) [ ] Validation threshold passed (15% waitlist OR 10+ presales)
BUILD: [ ] Outline generated (3-input engine) [ ] Module 1 quick win complete [ ] Templates/scripts included per module [ ] Onboarding "success path" designed [ ] Common pitfalls + troubleshooting added
DELIVERY: [ ] Checkout + delivery automated [ ] Welcome sequence ready [ ] Community access configured (if applicable) [ ] Support channels established

IDEA: [Name]
TRIANGULATED PROOF: [ ] Marketplace signals (what's selling): [ ] Ads signals (what's promoted): [ ] Community signals (pain language): Sources found: ___/3
SCORING (0-5 each): Pain intensity: ___ Urgency/time pressure: ___ Buyer identity clarity: ___ Existing proof: ___ Differentiation gap: ___ Distribution fit: ___ Monetization clarity: ___ TOTAL: ___/35
DECISION: [ ] Proceed [ ] Pivot [ ] Kill NOTES:
